checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan requires RED fixtures for forbidden evidence paths, invalid E2E directory naming, planted secret path+line reporting, valid current tree, Design missing ADC/project, non-Design Stitch skip, and redacted output.
Preimplementation plan review only; implementation has not started. The plan requires post-change runtime, local harness, lint/test, validator self-tests, and final reviewer evidence before Done.
PR7 plan does not change mobile UI/runtime behavior and explicitly forbids mobile-mcp/device/simulator/emulator execution in this offline slice.
PR7 plan does not change API request/response/domain schemas or apps/api; AGENTS.md contract SoT remains packages/contracts.

residual_risks: Parent goal plan still contains older PR7 wording about mobile-mcp pin drift, but the PR7-specific plan narrows the scope and cites PR6 executable coverage as the owner.
Offline Stitch preflight can report ADC/project configuration status only; it cannot prove live Stitch service enablement without a separately approved Google Cloud/Stitch operation.
Implementation must still persist reviewer evidence under .evidence/reviews/ and run the planned post-change gates before PR readiness.
